testcase.name: test_02_create_order_and_bill_for_testing
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_multiple_payments.py:119: in test_02_create_order_and_bill_for_testing assert add_item_response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to add item: {add_item_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to add item: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","items"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"product_id":"2298613b-acb3-41f7-85fe-7d31a3cff3cb","product_name":"Tostones con Queso","quantity":2,"unit_price":250,"modifiers":[]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_03_pay_with_single_payment_method
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_multiple_payments.py:181: in test_03_pay_with_single_payment_method assert pay_response.status_code == 200, f"Payment failed: {pay_response.text}" E AssertionError: Payment failed: {"detail":"No se puede procesar un pago con valor $0.00. La DGII no permite asignar NCF a facturas sin valor."} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_04_pay_with_multiple_payment_methods
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_multiple_payments.py:283: in test_04_pay_with_multiple_payment_methods assert pay_response.status_code == 200, f"Multiple payment failed: {pay_response.text}" E AssertionError: Multiple payment failed: {"detail":"No se puede procesar un pago con valor $0.00. La DGII no permite asignar NCF a facturas sin valor."} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_05_change_currency_and_amount_stored
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_multiple_payments.py:347: in test_05_change_currency_and_amount_stored assert pay_response.status_code == 200, f"Payment failed: {pay_response.text}" E AssertionError: Payment failed: {"detail":"No se puede procesar un pago con valor $0.00. La DGII no permite asignar NCF a facturas sin valor."} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_06_pay_with_foreign_currency_and_change
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_multiple_payments.py:430: in test_06_pay_with_foreign_currency_and_change assert pay_response.status_code == 200, f"USD Payment failed: {pay_response.text}" E AssertionError: USD Payment failed: {"detail":"No se puede procesar un pago con valor $0.00. La DGII no permite asignar NCF a facturas sin valor."} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_08_invoice_print_shows_multiple_payments
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_multiple_payments.py:587: in test_08_invoice_print_shows_multiple_payments assert pay_response.status_code == 200, f"Payment failed: {pay_response.text}" E AssertionError: Payment failed: {"detail":"No se puede procesar un pago con valor $0.00. La DGII no permite asignar NCF a facturas sin valor."} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_10_payment_model_validates_payments_entry
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_multiple_payments.py:714: in test_10_payment_model_validates_payments_entry assert pay_response.status_code == 200, f"Valid payment should succeed: {pay_response.text}" E AssertionError: Valid payment should succeed: {"detail":"No se puede procesar un pago con valor $0.00. La DGII no permite asignar NCF a facturas sin valor."} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
